results.term: I am not doing well. I am very worried about my so...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am not doing well. I am very worried about my son's chances of recovery after so many relapses and frustrated because I know there is really nothing I can do to change things for him.

results.term: I am. He is a different person when he's not on dr...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am. He is a different person when he's not on drugs but when he is using he can get really mean and he scares me.

results.term: I try not to think about the situation, because I ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I try not to think about the situation, because I don't see him since he lives in another state. But I can't get everything out of my mind. And yes I have my husband to talk to, that helps some. It's when I'm trying to sleep or when my husband isn't home that's the worst for me.

results.term: It does help but he's as frustrated and upset as I...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It does help but he's as frustrated and upset as I am. I can't sleep at night for dwelling on everything and I don't know how to stop the thoughts about all the terrible things that could happen.

results.term: When I'm upset about something I cannot sleep but ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: When I'm upset about something I cannot sleep but if I'm in a good state of mind I sleep well.

results.term: Yes I've been dealing with my son's addiction and ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes I've been dealing with my son's addiction and recovery and relapses for the last three years.

results.term: I am realizing that more every day. If it wasn't m...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am realizing that more every day. If it wasn't my son and just a good friend I would probably end the relationship but a mother can't do that to her own children, you know what I mean?

results.term: And you are so right. I can't change or control hi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And you are so right. I can't change or control him, I can only change and control myself and my responses to him. That is so difficult to do.

results.term: Not really. Most of my friends haven't dealt with ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Not really. Most of my friends haven't dealt with that so they don't really understand what I am going through, or even what my son is going through. But you're right, I have to learn to let go and let him fix his own problems with no intereference from me.
